sessions.summary: Shipped #126 proof-of-work clean message (squash 93a0a53). Operator flagged 'the bot is not really working' — investigated: engine was FINE (ApplicationService#40 got 5 real findings same day), the problem was the #120 clean verdict being byte-identical every time so a run of clean PRs read as a stuck/dead bot. Fix: clean verdict now carries per-PR stats 'no issues found across N rules — F files · L lines reviewed' via a single-source _buildCleanVerdictLine helper; graceful fallback keeps no-stats line byte-identical; architect caught+fixed a catchup double-em-dash + added AC-4b/4c regression guards. 534 tests. Bot v1.4 restarted under pm2.
done: Diagnosed 'bot not working' via logs + ground truth — engine fine, messaging miss
PM verdict: Option A (proof-of-work stats on clean verdict)
Architect design + implement + 2-round review (caught double-em-dash + missing regression test)
Merged PR #48, restarted bot under pm2
